description: Legal document. Written and signed by Shelomo b. Eliyyahu. Dated: Thursday, 17 Nisan 1540 Seleucid = 19 April 1229 CE. Also signed by Ṣadaqa b. Elʿazar. A woman appoints her father Mūsā to sue her husband (Tamīm?) for money that he owes her. The name Abū l-ʿAlāʾ also appears. The addendum on verso, from the same date, attests that Tamīm hands over all the items to his wife.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
